title: Eastern Mujadara Bowl with Crispy Fish
description: A flavorful and nutritious Middle Eastern-inspired dish featuring crispy fish, creamy mujadara, and a side of silky sauce.
instructions: Season the fish with Middle Eastern Spices and olive oil.
Place the fish on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, mix the silky sauce ingredients and set aside.
Warm the mujadara according to package instructions.
Cook the white rice according to package instructions.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the mujadara on a plate, followed by a piece of fish.
Drizzle the silky sauce over the fish and serve with a side of white rice.
Garnish with middle eastern spices and malty or eastern herbs if desired.
